Mixed martial arts events
2004 in Shooto
Information
First dateJanuary 24, 2004
Last dateDecember 14, 2004
Events
Total events17
Fights
Total fights129
Title fights4
Chronology
2003 in Shooto 2004 in Shooto 2005 in Shooto

The year 2004 is the 16th year in the history of Shooto, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Japan. In 2004 Shooto held 17 events beginning with, Shooto 2004: 1/24 in Korakuen Hall.

Title fights

[edit]
Title fights in 2004
Weight class Method Round Time Event Notes
Flyweight Mamoru Yamaguchi (c) vs. Robson Moura Draw 3 5:00 Shooto: 9/26 in Kourakuen Hall [a]
Bantamweight Ryota Matsune (c) def. Kentaro Imaizumi Decision (Split) 3 5:00 Shooto: Wanna Shooto 2004 [b]
Lightweight Tatsuya Kawajiri def. Vítor Ribeiro (c) TKO (Punches) 2 3:11 Shooto: 3/22 in Korakuen Hall [c]
Welterweight Akira Kikuchi def. Jake Shields (c) Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 Shooto: Year End Show 2004 [d]
  1. ^ For the Flyweight Championship.
  2. ^ For the Bantamweight Championship.
  3. ^ For the Lightweight Championship.
  4. ^ For the Welterweight Championship.
